name: synthwave-noir
author: UnionPAC
description: Neon lights and deep city nights. Hot pink, violet, and electric cyan on near-black.

name: ocean-depths
author: UnionPAC
description: Bioluminescent abyss. Deep teals, seafoam, and coral on deep navy.

name: ember-ash
author: UnionPAC
description: Forge heat and smoldering coal. Amber, ember red, and gold on dark charcoal.

name: forest-dark
author: UnionPAC
description: Old growth canopy, moss and rain. Neon lime, forest green, and earth tones on near-black.
